scope: Version, provenance, authority, reuse, and unit-level English-coverage audit for the four complete Chinese corpora currently stored by Compliance Compass.

policy.authorityRule: An English text is never labelled co-authentic merely because a government body publishes it. The promulgated Chinese text controls unless the issuing authority expressly states otherwise.
sourcePriority: government-published complete reference translation aligned to the current Chinese version
complete reusable public-sector reference translation aligned to the current Chinese version
complete project-authored editorial translation with an explicit non-official label
excludedSources: commercial or law-firm translations without republication permission
older English translations presented as if they reflected the current amended Chinese law
concept summaries or coverage notices presented as Article text
policy.displayRule: The English toggle may display stored Article text only when the Article has a non-empty translations.en.fullText whose version and authority metadata are present. Otherwise the interface must show a conspicuous coverage notice outside the legal-text container.

instruments.officialTitle: 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
instruments.englishTitle: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China

currentVersion.versionLabel: Law adopted 20 August 2021 and effective 1 November 2021

translation.sourceLabel: National People's Congress of the People's Republic of China — Laws (Translation for Reference Only)
translation.authorityNote: The NPC publishes this complete English text in its 'Laws (Translation for Reference Only)' collection. It is not a co-authentic enactment; the Chinese text controls.
translation.recommendedUiLabel: COMPLETE NPC REFERENCE ENGLISH · CHINESE CONTROLS

rights.basis: PRC Copyright Law Article 5 excludes laws, regulations, legislative/administrative/judicial documents, and their official translations from copyright protection. This corpus retains NPC attribution and the NPC's reference-only authority label.
rights.attribution: National People's Congress of the People's Republic of China

sourceSnapshots.role: NPC reference-translation index and authority wrapper

instruments.officialTitle: 网络数据安全管理条例
instruments.englishTitle: Regulations on Network Data Security Management

currentVersion.versionLabel: State Council Order No. 790, effective 1 January 2025

translation.sourceLabel: Ministry of Justice of the People's Republic of China
translation.authorityNote: The Ministry of Justice publishes a complete English rendering of State Council Order No. 790. The project does not represent it as co-authentic with the promulgated Chinese text; the Chinese text controls.
translation.sourceFidelityNote: The stored English text preserves the Ministry PDF's wording, including apparent source typographical or drafting anomalies, rather than silently rewriting them.
translation.recommendedUiLabel: COMPLETE MOJ REFERENCE ENGLISH · CHINESE CONTROLS

rights.basis: PRC Copyright Law Article 5 excludes laws, regulations, legislative/administrative/judicial documents, and their official translations from copyright protection. This corpus retains Ministry of Justice attribution and does not claim co-authenticity.
rights.attribution: Ministry of Justice of the People's Republic of China

sourceSnapshots.role: deterministic text extraction used by the importer

instruments.officialTitle: 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法
instruments.englishTitle: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services

translation.sourceLabel: China Aerospace Studies Institute, Air University, United States Department of the Air Force
translation.authorityNote: CASI's complete English reference is not a Chinese government translation and has no legal effect. The official Chinese Order No. 15 text controls.
translation.normalizationNote: The normalized snapshot retains all 24 Article bodies and translator-supplied square-bracket explanatory glosses; page headers, footers, and footnotes are excluded from Article text.
translation.recommendedUiLabel: COMPLETE U.S. GOVERNMENT REFERENCE ENGLISH · NOT PRC-OFFICIAL · CHINESE CONTROLS

rights.basis: CASI identifies Josh Baughman as its analyst and Air University records his participation in the Defense Civilian Emerging Leader Program. Air University states that a manuscript written by a government employee as part of the employee's job is public domain; 17 U.S.C. §§ 101 and 105 govern United States Government works. The source PDF carries no contrary copyright notice.
rights.attribution: Josh Baughman; China Aerospace Studies Institute, Air University

sourceSnapshots.role: normalized full Article text from the public-domain government reference translation

instruments.officialTitle: 中华人民共和国网络安全法
instruments.englishTitle: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China

currentVersion.versionLabel: Consolidated Chinese text amended 28 October 2025 and effective 1 January 2026

translation.authorityNote: No complete Chinese-government English text aligned to the 81-Article consolidation effective 1 January 2026 was located in this audit. The stored English is a complete project-authored navigation and study aid, not an official translation; the current Chinese text controls.
translation.versionBoundary: English texts based on the pre-amendment 2016/2017 law must not be presented as the current 2026 consolidation.
translation.recommendedUiLabel: COMPLETE EDITORIAL ENGLISH · NOT OFFICIAL · 2026 CHINESE CONTROLS

rights.basis: The English text is original project-authored editorial material, not copied from a protected third-party translation. The controlling Chinese statutory text falls under PRC Copyright Law Article 5.
rights.projectLicenseBoundary: The project-authored English reference is licensed under CC BY 4.0. Preserve attribution together with the non-official and Chinese-controls notices.

sources.label: Cyberspace Administration of China reproduction of the NPC consolidated text
Standing Committee of the National People's Congress amendment decision
